items.title: BMW launches M440i xDrive Convertible in India at ₹1.09 crore
items.summary: The performance convertible is powered by a 3.0-litre six-cylinder petrol engine producing 374 hp and 500 Nm, and claims a 0-100 kmph time of 4.9 seconds.

items.title: Tata Motors launches new Curvv.ev variants priced from ₹16.99 lakh
items.summary: The new variants have a 55-kWh battery pack offering a certified driving range of up to 502 km.

items.title: Tata Curvv EV SeriesX Launch Price Starts Rs 16.99 Lakh – 55 kWh, 502 km Range
items.summary: Tata Curvv EV SeriesX launch price is Rs 16.99 lakh (Ex-sh), consisting of Accomplished X and Empowered X trims with 55 kWh battery pack The post Tata Curvv EV SeriesX Launch Price Starts Rs 16.99 Lakh – 55 kWh, 502 km Range appeared first on RushLane .

items.title: BMW M440i Convertible Launch Price Rs 1.09 Cr – 374 bhp, 250 Km/h, 4.9s 0-100
items.summary: BMW M440i Convertible has been launched in India at Rs 1.09 Cr (Ex-sh), undercutting its rival, Mercedes CLE Cabriolet The post BMW M440i Convertible Launch Price Rs 1.09 Cr – 374 bhp, 250 Km/h, 4.9s 0-100 appeared first on RushLane .
